name: prueba_desempe-o_db
description: WITH ins_users AS (     INSERT INTO juan_lopez.users          (customer_name, customer_email, customer_address, customer_phone)     SELECT          t.customer_name,         t.customer_email,         t.customer_address,         t.customer_phone     FROM juan_lopez.test t     ON CONFLICT (customer_email) DO NOTHING     RETURNING id_user ),
